creator: atodorov@redhat.com
text:
I am trying to boot/install FreeBSD as Xen guest using full virt.
The FreeBSD kernel does not boot and is constantly printing an error message.
My environment is:
* (dom0) Red Hat Enterprise Linux 5
* xen-libs-3.0.3-25.0.3.el5
* kernel-xen-2.6.18-8.1.8.el5
* (domU) FreeBSD 6.2 (boot only iso) or Debian/kFreeBSD, PC-BSD

How-To-Repeat: Try to install FreeBSD using full virtualization with Xen and regular file as disc image.
